meta_description: Pastanetwork network Looking Glass: run live ping, traceroute and MTR tests from our network.
hero_subtitle: Test network connectivity from the Pastanetwork infrastructure: ping, traceroute and MTR in real time.
form_myip_hint: Use my IP address as the target
tool_ping_desc: Measures latency and packet loss to the target.
tool_traceroute_desc: Shows the network path to the target, hop by hop.
tool_mtr_desc: Combines ping and traceroute: per-hop statistics.
tool_speedtest_desc: Measures download throughput from the Pastanetwork network.
console_idle: Pick a tool, enter a target and run the command.
visual_empty: The visual result will appear here.
mtr_running: MTR running… the report is shown all at once, at the end (about 15 seconds).
traceroute_running: Traceroute running… analysing the network path.
speedtest_idle: Pick a size and start the test.
err_turnstile: Anti-bot verification failed. Please try again.
err_ratelimit: Too many requests. Please wait a moment.
err_busy: The service is momentarily saturated. Try again shortly.
err_myip: Could not retrieve your IP address.
about_what_body: A Looking Glass is a public network diagnostic tool. It lets you run commands (ping, traceroute, MTR) from the Pastanetwork network to a destination of your choice, to measure latency, observe routing and detect possible packet loss.
about_how_body: Pick a tool, enter an IP address or hostname, then run the command. The result is streamed live, line by line, like a terminal.
about_privacy_body: Queries are logged for security and statistics purposes. Source IP addresses are never stored in clear text: they are hashed irreversibly.
about_opensource: This Looking Glass is free software, released under the MIT license.
footer_desc: Public network diagnostics: live ping, traceroute and MTR from the Pastanetwork infrastructure.
error_429: Too many requests. Try again shortly.
